footer.description: Open developer building mini apps and tools.

home.bio: I build fast, accessible web apps and Telegram mini-apps. Open-source enthusiast, TypeScript lover.

about.title: About me
about.bio_1: I'm a frontend developer focused on building great user experiences. I love TypeScript, React, and the Telegram Mini App ecosystem.
about.bio_2: When I'm not coding I'm reading docs, experimenting with new tools, or hanging out in open-source communities.

apps.title: Mini apps
apps.subtitle: A collection of small tools and experiments.
apps.project1Desc: This very site — built with Next.js, Tailwind v4 and i18n.
apps.project2Desc: A lightweight Telegram Mini App to capture and organise ideas on the go.
apps.project3Desc: A set of reusable React components with full TypeScript types.
